title: poa arctica subsp. lanata
intro: Poa arctica subsp. lanata, also known as Arctic hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Arctic tundra. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa arctica subsp. lanata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Poa arctica subsp. lanata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
